title: Memory Feature Gap — Orvex vs the Field
verdict_summary: Draft, AI-authored competitive assessment (synthesis of the memory canon, not a primary requirements spec). It carries NO formal requirement IDs of its own; its build obligations are the 'Fix three before launch' recommendations plus the Tier-1/2/3 gap list. Every one of those actionable obligations maps to an existing story or pack, so zero uncovered gaps. Coverage: browser-extension/cross-AI delivery -> ENG-2689/2690 browser-extension packs + Five-AI export/clipboard fallback + MCP/Claude memory-tool adapter surfaces; extraction quality bar + eval -> async extraction pipeline at proposal quality bar + continuous proposal-quality eval regression gate + retrieval eval harness (recall@10 >= 0.80, public benchmark); frozen Memory card schema -> versioned Memory card schema + FormSpec story; Memory lifecycle -> bi-temporal lifecycle + reconcile + staleness/verification queue; BYOK/SOC2/HIPAA -> BYOK KMS customer-managed keys + SOC2 Type II + HIPAA BAA compliance slice.

components.name: Browser-extension (or equivalent) inject path for ChatGPT/Gemini web UIs
components.quote: Spec + prototype a browser-extension (or equivalent) inject path for the ChatGPT / Gemini web UIs — the non-technical delivery mechanism, not just MCP.

components.name: Memory extraction quality bar + retrieval eval harness
components.quote: Put a quality bar + eval on extraction and retrieval — the confirm loop is only as good as what it proposes.

components.name: Frozen Memory data model / card schema
components.quote: Freeze the Memory data model and its lifecycle (schema + temporal / decay / reconcile)

components.name: Memory lifecycle (temporal validity, decay, retention, atom-level reconcile state machine)
components.quote: No temporal validity, decay, staleness, retention, or atom-level reconcile state machine for curated Memory

components.name: BYOK + SOC2/HIPAA compliance for regulated-professional beachhead
components.quote: add BYOK for the regulated-professional beachhead ... SOC2 / HIPAA / BYOK is the market bar

components.name: orvex-studio-ai (chat / ask / metering)
components.quote: orvex-studio-ai (chat / ask / metering), the Studio<->MCP session layer, the skill/memory/chat corpora, and every cross-AI delivery surface are design-only.

components.name: orvex-studio-api /v1/memory (curated Memory store)
components.quote: Memory — curated facts, the "RAM," owned by orvex-studio-api /v1/memory

components.name: Prompt Composer (skill + Memory + wiki fusion at prompt-composition time)
components.quote: Injection happens at prompt-composition time (the Prompt Composer fuses skill + Memory + wiki via RAG)

components.name: Outbound Memory sync adapters into native vendor memories (Claude adapter; MCP-KG interop fallback)
components.quote: outbound Memory sync into native vendor memories (Claude adapter specced; ChatGPT platform-blocked; MCP-KG interop as fallback)
